title: Fermented Crunchy Slovakian Tomatoes Salad
description: A quick paleo-friendly salad featuring baby plum tomatoes, fermented red peppers, and a broiled tomato glaze, finished with a tangy kombu broth.

ingredients.name: Kombu brine
ingredients.notes: prepared by dissolving 1 tsp salt in water and steeping kelp flakes for 10 min

instructions: Prepare kombu brine: dissolve 1 tsp salt in 250 ml water, add kelp flakes, and let steep 10 min; strain.
Toss halved baby plum tomatoes in the kombu brine; cover and refrigerate for 12 h to ferment lightly.
While tomatoes ferment, warm coconut aminos, lemon juice, minced garlic, and a pinch of red pepper flakes in a small saucepan until just hot; set aside.
After fermentation, remove tomatoes from brine and pat dry.
Preheat oven broiler. Drizzle tomatoes with extra‑virgin olive oil; broil for 3–4 min until edges caramelize, turning once.
In a large bowl, combine baby spinach, fermented red pepper strips, sliced olives, chopped parsley, and roasted sunflower seeds.
Add broiled tomatoes to the bowl and gently toss.
Drizzle with the warmed coconut aminos/garlic sauce; sprinkle crushed red pepper flakes if desired; toss again until evenly coated.
Serve immediately on a plate; garnish with a few kelp flakes and a squeeze of lemon.
